title: Galt 20 Giant Chalks - Extra Large Childrens Chunky Pavement Chalks - Bright Vibrant Colours - Washable, Easy Clean Outdoor Kids Garden Toys - Portable Carry Case with Handle - Ages 3 Years Plus
features: INSPIRE YOUNG MINDS: These 20 giant chalks in 7 different bright and vibrant colours offer your child endless options for drawing, They provide a fun way for children to express their artistic skills
HANDY CARRY CASE: Each set of 20 jumbo chalks comes with a compact, portable travel case for carrying your chalks, The carry handle makes it easy for kids to take their art supplies wherever they go
HARDWEARING CHALKS: The extra large chalks for children are lightweight and easy for small hands to grip, and are likewise strong and durable, ensuring long-lasting fun, entertainment and creativity
WASHABLE and EASY CLEAN CHALK SET: The young childrens chalks are washable and easy to clean off any surface, ensuring your family can enjoy mess-free drawing, ideal for both indoor and outdoor use

GIANT CHALKS FOR KIDS: These 20 extra large, vibrant and colourful chunky chalks are perfect for sparking creativity in children ages 3 years plus, Ideal for use as kids garden toys as pavement chalks
description: From the manufacturer Galt Toys, Young Art Range The Young Art range from Galt contains everything budding artists need to let their imaginations run wild! From the washable Paintastics and mess-free Squeeze 'n Brush range to Window Markers and Finger Paints, every product encourages self-expression, innovation, and creativity, as well as helping to improve decision-making and problem-solving skills. There are plenty of options for rainy day activities and screen-free play, including many mess-free and washable products for colourful, creative play without the stress. Recommended for ages 3 years +.
